description: This diagram illustrates the structure and accompanying layers of the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) CLCplus Backbone (BB) Raster Update product for 2023. The primary product, the CLCplus BB Raster Update 2023, is characterised by 11 land cover classes and a 10-metre spatial resolution. Associated with this main product are three complementary layers: a Confidence Layer, a Data Score Layer, and a Post-Processing Layer.
